description: Curated catalog of tools this AIOS workspace can connect. status: 'available' = a connector exists and is documented here; 'wired' = configured in .mcp.json / on PATH for this workspace. Connect a tool, then flip its status to 'wired'. See docs/integrations.md.

integrations.name: Slack
integrations.summary: Read channels and threads, post messages, pull conversation context.
integrations.connect: Add the Slack MCP server to .mcp.json with a bot token (SLACK_BOT_TOKEN) and team id (SLACK_TEAM_ID). See .mcp.example.json.

integrations.name: Jira
integrations.summary: Search issues, read/comment/transition tickets, manage sprints and worklogs.
integrations.connect: Add the mcp-atlassian server to .mcp.json with your site URL and an API token. Covers Jira + Confluence.

integrations.name: Confluence
integrations.summary: Search spaces, read/create/update pages, manage comments and attachments.
integrations.connect: Shares the mcp-atlassian server with Jira — one config covers both.

integrations.name: Linear
integrations.summary: Query issues/projects/cycles, create and update issues, track status.
integrations.connect: Add the Linear MCP server to .mcp.json; authenticate via OAuth on first use.

integrations.name: Notion
integrations.summary: Search workspace, read/append pages and databases.
integrations.connect: Add the Notion MCP server to .mcp.json with an integration token (NOTION_TOKEN) and share the relevant pages with the integration.

integrations.name: GitHub
integrations.summary: Read repos/PRs/issues, search code, manage branches and reviews.
integrations.connect: Add the GitHub MCP server to .mcp.json with a fine-grained PAT (GITHUB_TOKEN), or use the `gh` CLI already on most machines.

integrations.name: Gmail / Google Workspace
integrations.summary: Read/send email, calendar, and drive via the gog-cli tool.
integrations.connect: Install gog-cli and run its OAuth login (`gog auth login`); the agent calls it via Bash. No MCP server required.

integrations.name: Granola
integrations.summary: Pull meeting notes/transcripts to feed transcript-decisions and weekly-synthesis.
integrations.connect: Export Granola notes to 1-inbox/transcripts/ (manual export or the Granola API/CLI), then run the transcript-decisions harness.

integrations.name: Mattermost
integrations.summary: Read channels, post messages — self-hosted chat alternative to Slack.
integrations.connect: Add a Mattermost MCP server to .mcp.json with your server URL and a personal access token.

integrations.name: Toggl
integrations.summary: Start/stop timers, read entries and summaries — reconcile against 3-log/hours-log.md.
integrations.connect: Add a Toggl MCP server to .mcp.json with your API token (TOGGL_API_KEY).
